Description: Recording file of the epoched signal
TaskDescription: Sequence: 4 min alternating eyes closed/open (COCO: Closed-Open-Closed-Open), 8 min eyes closed (excluded from current dataset)
SubjectArtefactDescription: Bad channel rejection: Flat signals > 5s, SD > 4, Correlation < 0.8 with neighbors
InstitutionName: Centro de Reeducación el Oasis (Soledad), Institución Universitaria de Barranquilla (Sede Soledad), Luz de Esperanza Foundation
InstitutionalDepartmentName: MAGMA Ingeniería research group, Hogares Claret foundation
